machinery.
Ketu of anti-clockwise motion meets Mercury, Venus' and the Moon
in his transits. This indicates that the native's marriage will take place
around his 31st year. The wife will be intelligent and well-educated but
she will desert the native and elope with her former friend. The native
will marry again a woman Of a low class though she will be helpful to
others. Thus the native's marital happiness will be almost nil. He will
have three" or four children.
